Lightness

It controls how light or dark a color appears by adding white or black. It ranges from 0% (black) to 100% (white), with 50% being the normal color.

- 0% lightness: Black
- 50% lightness: Normal color
- 100% lightness: White https://t.co/ALxamtu9AS

Saturation

It defines the intensity or purity of a color. A fully saturated color has no gray, while a completely desaturated color appears gray.

- 0% saturation: Grayscale
- 50% saturation: Moderate color intensity
- 100% saturation: Vivid color https://t.co/PVjHXl5SZe

Hue

It represents the color itself & is measured in degrees (0° to 360°) on the color wheel. Here are some common hues you might recognize:

- Red: 0°
- Yellow: 60°
- Green: 120°
- Cyan: 180°
- Blue: 240°
- Magenta: 300° https://t.co/jyT4eQNQAj
